subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath ordained death as a herald of glad tidings unto them that are nigh, the sincere ones, and the yearning souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که موت را مبشر قرار فرمود از برای مقربین و مخلصین و مشتاقین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @soul; spirit after death, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
